query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as price_history_records FROM ingredientPriceHistory WHERE invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131;
SELECT COUNT(*) as alerts_created FROM alerts WHERE title LIKE 'Price %' AND createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
